Specifically, the reference mentions "[99] The ETDRS defines diabetic macular edema (DME) as a thickening of the retina or the presence of hard exudates within 1 disc diameter from the center of the macula." This suggests that the ETDRS grading system is directly involved in defining and classifying diabetic macular edema rather than being applied generally across different aspects of retinopathy.
